name: Iron Staff
description: A unique staff wielded by the Wukong Warframe.

patchlogs.name: Heart of Deimos: Hotfix 29.0.6
patchlogs.fixes: Another fixed towards Wukong Prime's Iron Staff not blocking 100% of Damage as intended.

patchlogs.name: Heart of Deimos: Hotfix 29.0.5
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a localization issue with Iron Staff.

patchlogs.name: Derelict Shift: Update 28.3.0
patchlogs.changes: Wukong’s Iron Staff now has a 100% Damage block.

patchlogs.name: The Steel Path: Inaros Prime 28.2.0 + 28.2.0.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed hearing Client Wukong Iron Staff FX sounds when the Wukong is far enough that you shouldn't hear it.

patchlogs.name: The Old Blood: Hotfix 26.0.3
patchlogs.additions: Fixed a crash if you failed a Kuva Lich Requiem combination as Wukong with your Iron Staff equipped.

patchlogs.name: Update 26: The Old Blood
patchlogs.changes: All melee-based Exalted Weapons have received the Phase 2 functionality treatment, gaining access to the combo changes. For those of you who may have missed it, Wukong’s Exalted Iron Staff has already had this functionality implemented (with the exception of the new Heavy Attacks and changes to the Slam Attacks).

patchlogs.name: Saint of Altra: Update 25.7.0
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Iron Staff’s Energy drain not occuring when cast with Defy after emptying ammo from the only weapon equipped. 
Fixed some ugly texture stretching on the Wukong Samadhi Iron Staff Skin in the in-game Market.

patchlogs.name: The Jovian Concord: Update 25.2.0
patchlogs.changes:
Primal Fury will feature a new specialized and streamlined combo for Wukong’s legendary Iron Staff. As a preview of the upcoming Melee 3.0 system, Wukong’s Primal Fury uses new combo routes with simplified inputs providing a safe, limited space to try out coming releases.
The range of Wukong’s Iron Staff is always long, comparable to top range Zaws, and no longer needs to build combo to scale range.

patchlogs.name: Beasts of the Sanctuary: Hotfix 22.18.7
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Wukong’s Primal Fury adding increased Range to all Melee weapons instead of just his Iron Staff.

patchlogs.name: Shrine of the Eidolon: Update 22.17.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Wukong's Iron Staff not getting as large/buffed as it should be for Clients during melee combos.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.5: Sands of Inaros
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Wukong’s Iron Staff animations breaking if a player uses their melee attack on a Nullifier.
